title: The Devil Within
writer: George Allan England, Arthur J. Zellner
actors: Dustin Farnum, Virginia Valli, Nigel De Brulier
plot: Captain Briggs, a drunkard and a tyrannical brute, while cruising in the South Seas in the 1870's, steals an idol from some islanders and thereby provokes an attack on his ship. The natives are beaten, and their witch calls down a...
